channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Flu and RSV Circulating Early: Vaccination Urged for High-Risk Groups
item.description: South Africa’s flu season has arrived earlier than usual, with cases of influenza and respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) already being reported. The National Institute for Communicable Diseases (NICD) ...

item.title: Toronto Jewish community targeted in hate-motivated gel-blaster attack
item.description: Toronto police are investigating a hate-motivated assault in North York in which visibly Jewish individuals were shot with a gel-blaster, a non-lethal firearm that fires water-absorbent beads. The inc...

item.title: Preparations and issues reported before West Bengal vote counting
item.description: The news article reportedly discusses the events in West Bengal just before the counting of votes during the recent elections. Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee made a significant move or statement prior...

item.title: Tanzania and Rwanda Deepen Cooperation in Trade, Infrastructure, and Energy
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan of Tanzania and President Paul Kagame of Rwanda met in Dar es Salaam to discuss ways of strengthening bilateral relations. During the one-day working visit, they focused ...

item.title: Shoppers Misidentified by Facial Recognition Face Challenges to Prove Their Innocence
item.description: Facial recognition systems, used by retailers across the UK to combat shoplifting, have been misidentifying innocent shoppers, causing distress and embarrassment. Many victims, like Ian Clayton and Wa...

item.title: Steven Glass, co-founder of Pella Funds Management, passes away aged 48
item.description: Steven Glass, the co-founder of Pella Funds Management and a respected figure in the investment sector, has passed away at the age of 48. Glass had a significant career at Pengana Capital before estab...

item.title: FIR lodged against BJP candidate D.N. Jeevaraj and officials over postal ballot tampering in Sringeri
item.description: In Chikkamagaluru, a fresh FIR has been lodged against BJP candidate D.N. Jeevaraj, along with former Deputy Commissioner K.N. Ramesh, former Returning Officer Vedamurthy, and others, over allegations...

item.title: Former Minister Adelabu Confirms Tinubu Approves His Oyo Governorship Bid
item.description: Former Minister of Works, Adebayo Adelabu, don confirm say President Bola Tinubu don give am the go-ahead to resign and run for Oyo State governorship on the All Progressives Congress (APC) platform. ...

item.title: Osimhen Urges Galatasaray To Focus On Next Match After Samsunspor Loss
item.description: Nigerian striker Victor Osimhen don dey tell Galatasaray make dem no dwell on their 4-1 loss to Samsunspor as Turkish Super Lig title race dey near finish. After the match on Saturday, Osimhen talk sa...

item.title: 'Devil Wears Prada 2' leads North American box office in opening weekend
item.description: The much-anticipated sequel 'Devil Wears Prada 2' has officially taken the lead at the North American box office during its opening weekend. Released across major cinemas in the United States and Cana...

item.title: Nairobi Businesswoman Fulfills Client's Verification Requests Before Sale
item.description: A Nairobi-based businesswoman, who sells women's bags and shoes, had a surprising experience with a cautious client recently. The client, worried about being scammed, made three unusual requests befor...

item.title: Romy Ash’s 'Mantle' Explores Humanity, Nature, and an Unusual Fungal Pandemic
item.description: Romy Ash’s latest eco-fiction novel, 'Mantle', explores a near-future fungal pandemic that intertwines the natural world with human experience in unexpectedly beautiful ways. Set in southern Tasmania,...

item.title: Sydney Swans dominate AFL with speed, handball chains and standout forward performance
item.description: Sydney Swans surged to the top of the AFL ladder following a thrilling 19.17 (131) to 17.12 (114) win over Melbourne, powered by Malcolm Rosas Jr’s seven-goal haul. Rosas, grandson of WAFL legend Bill...

item.title: Government Moves to Compensate One Constitution Avenue Apartment Owners After Lease Dispute
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The federal government has decided to compensate apartment owners of One Constitution Avenue at the price they originally paid. The move comes after a prolonged legal and administrative dis...

item.title: Sir Alex Ferguson Taken to Hospital After Feeling Unwell at Old Trafford
item.description: Legendary former Manchester United manager, Sir Alex Ferguson, waka go hospital on May 3, 2026, after he fall sick for Old Trafford just small time before the big match wey suppose happen between Manc...

item.title: Director Agnieszka Holland Announces Biopic on Franz Kafka with Limited Ticket Giveaway
item.description: Award-winning director Agnieszka Holland is embarking on what is described as her most ambitious project yet: a biographical film about Franz Kafka, the renowned 20th-century Czech writer known for hi...

item.title: Vote Counting Underway in Key Indian States with Modi’s Party Seeking Gains
item.description: Vote counting is ongoing in several important Indian states, with special attention on West Bengal, where Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) is trying to make significant gain...

item.title: UAE Leaves Opec Amid Output and Geopolitical Disagreements
item.description: The United Arab Emirates, one of the largest oil producers in Opec, officially left the organisation after nearly sixty years of membership, causing a major disruption in global oil dynamics. The UAE ...

item.title: Lauren Sanchez and Jeff Bezos Attend Pre-Met Gala in New York City
item.description: Jeff Bezos and Lauren Sanchez were seen arriving at Anna Wintour's pre-Met Gala event in New York City on Sunday evening. The Amazon founder, aged 62, looked polished in a light grey suit, black shirt...

item.title: Sandra Mbuvi Honoured as Top Female Entrepreneur at Africa Golden Awards
item.description: Former Nairobi governor Mike Sonko is beaming with pride after his daughter, Sandra Mbuvi, was recognised as the African Top Best Female Entrepreneur at the Africa Golden Awards. The event, which took...
